text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin does a fantastic job in<n>her debut
race, but her journey has<n>only just begun.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If she's to be seen as a fully capable<n>racer, she'll
have to overcome one of<n>the toughest challenges
out there.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She makes the Classic Triple Crown<n>her main goal
for next year, and to<n>better prepare for it, we
decide for her<n>to run in the Hopeful Stakes.
